title: clerodendrum petunioides
intro: Clerodendrum petunioides, also known as the "Kalanchoe" or "Summer Glory", is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum petunioides include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
